name: Shoulder Flexion
description: Raise your arm forward and upward
instructions: Stand with arms at your side. Slowly raise your arm forward to shoulder height, then continue upward as far as comfortable. Lower slowly.

name: Shoulder Abduction
description: Raise your arm out to the side
instructions: Stand upright with arms at your side. Slowly raise one arm out to the side until it is level with your shoulder. Hold briefly, then lower slowly.

name: Elbow Flexion
instructions: Hold your arm at your side with elbow straight. Slowly bend your elbow, bringing your hand toward your shoulder. Straighten slowly and repeat.

name: Knee Extension
description: Straighten your knee from a seated position
instructions: Sit upright on a chair. Slowly straighten your knee until your leg is extended. Hold for 2 seconds, then lower slowly.

name: Knee Flexion
description: Bend your knee as far as comfortable
instructions: Stand holding a support. Slowly bend your knee, bringing your heel toward your buttocks. Hold briefly, then lower slowly.

name: Hip Abduction
description: Raise your leg out to the side
instructions: Stand upright, holding a support for balance. Slowly raise one leg out to the side, keeping your toe pointed forward. Lower slowly.

name: Shoulder External Rotation
description: Rotate your shoulder outward with elbow bent
instructions: Hold your elbow at 90° at your side. Rotate your forearm outward, keeping your elbow tucked. Return slowly.

name: Straight Leg Raise
description: Lift your straight leg from a lying position
instructions: Lie flat on your back. Keep one knee bent with foot flat. Tighten the thigh of the other leg and raise it to the height of the bent knee. Lower slowly.
